---
title: ""
page-layout: full
---

<div id="site-header">
<h1>Dog Capital</h1>
<p>Systematic strategies for Argentine investors</p>
</div>

<div id="site-nav">
<a href="#about">About</a>
<a href="#programs">Programs</a>
<a href="#contact">Contact</a>
</div>

<div class="section" id="about">

## About

Dog Capital builds and runs systematic investment programs for Argentine investors.

Markets are efficient. Beating the S&P 500 consistently over a long period is hard —
most strategies that claim to do it don't survive transaction costs or look-ahead bias.
Rather than searching for alpha that probably isn't there, we focus on a simpler goal:
match the benchmark while meaningfully reducing drawdowns.

We do this through volatility targeting — sizing positions based on realized downside
volatility rather than trying to predict direction. Scale in when markets are calm,
scale back when they are not. The result is a smoother ride with comparable long-term returns.

Programs run on instruments available to Argentine retail investors: CEDEARs via local
brokers. Code is proprietary; results are public.

</div>

<div class="section" id="programs">

## Programs

<div class="program-card">

### SPY Core

<span class="tag live">Live</span>
<span class="tag">CEDEARs</span>
<span class="tag">Monthly</span>
<span class="tag">No leverage</span>

Monthly accumulation into SPY CEDEARs, sized by downside volatility targeting.
When realized volatility is low the strategy deploys capital fully; when it rises,
it scales back. Idle capital earns the dólar-linked rate.

Designed for Argentine investors building USD-denominated savings over the long term.

**Backtest (2001–2026):** CAGR 9.45% · Sharpe 0.693 · Max DD -36.97%

[Strategy document →](programs/spy-core.qmd)

</div>

</div>

<div class="section" id="contact">

## Contact

Independent. Not a fund. Open to conversations.

</div>

<div id="site-footer">
&copy; 2026 Dog Capital &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Buenos Aires &nbsp;&middot;&nbsp; Last updated: June 2026
</div>
